name: LOM sales order
script:
# =============================================================================
# Noyan LOM (v3) — copy LOM data from Quotation -> Sales Order
# Server Script:
#   Script Type       = Document Event
#   Reference DocType = Sales Order
#   DocType Event     = Before Insert
#   Enabled
# Paste the body below (everything under this comment block).
# =============================================================================

FIELDMAP = {
    "custom_lom_floors": ["floor_name"],
    "custom_lom_spaces": ["floor", "space"],
    "custom_lom_categories": ["category", "total_qty", "cell_data"],
    "custom_lom_products": ["item_code", "item_name", "description",
                            "total_qty", "cell_data"],
}

source_quotation = None
if doc.items:
    source_quotation = doc.items[0].get("prevdoc_docname")

if source_quotation:
    src = frappe.get_doc("Quotation", source_quotation)
    if not doc.get("custom_list_type"):
        doc.custom_list_type = src.get("custom_list_type")
    for table_field, cols in FIELDMAP.items():
        if doc.get(table_field):
            continue
        for r in src.get(table_field):
            doc.append(table_field, {c: r.get(c) for c in cols})
